parameters.query:
WITH location_data AS (
  SELECT
    l.system_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',            l.id,
        'source_id',     l.source_id,
        'name',          l.name,
        'location_type', l.location_type,
        'body_id',       l.body_id,
        'metadata',      l.metadata
      ) ORDER BY l.name
    ) AS locations
  FROM locations l
  WHERE l.system_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY l.system_id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(s.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))),
  'system',
  s.name,
  NULL,
  s.metadata->>'code',
  (s.metadata->>'id')::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',       s.name,
    'source_id',  s.source_id,
    'code',       s.metadata->>'code',
    'wiki',       s.metadata->>'wiki',
    'date_added', s.metadata->>'date_added',
    'metadata',   s.metadata,
    'locations',  COALESCE(ld.locations, '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(s.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(s.metadata->>'code', '')
  ),
  now()
FROM active_systems s
LEFT JOIN location_data ld ON ld.system_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'star_system'
  AND esc.uex_slug = trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(s.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g')))
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
